title: StudioDash Features
description: Discover the features that make StudioDash the central workspace for managing apps, revenue, websites, and developer services.
summary: StudioDash combines analytics, portfolio management, provider health, reporting, and historical trends into one native workspace for independent developers.

featureShowcases.heading: Everything You Need in One Workspace
featureShowcases.summary: StudioDash brings together the information developers check every day, helping you stay focused on building great apps instead of switching between dashboards.
featureShowcases.body: Revenue, App Store performance, website analytics, provider health, and reporting all work together in a single native workspace. Start with a quick overview, then drill into the areas that need your attention without losing context.
bullets: Monitor apps, revenue, websites, and providers together.
Quickly move from summary cards to detailed analytics.
Clear status information for configured, unavailable, and planned providers.

image.alt: StudioDash dashboard showing portfolio health and analytics overview
image.caption: One workspace for your entire developer portfolio.

sections.heading: Built Around the Way Developers Work
paragraphs: StudioDash is organised around the questions developers ask every day: How are my apps performing? Has revenue changed? Are my integrations healthy? Is my website attracting visitors?
Instead of switching between multiple services, StudioDash brings the answers together in one place, making it easier to understand what needs attention and what is performing well.
bullets: App Store Connect downloads, ratings, reviews, and lifecycle status.
Website and SEO insights from Cloudflare and Google Search Console.

sections.heading: Designed for Mac and iPad
paragraphs: StudioDash is built as a native application for macOS and iPadOS, providing a focused experience that feels at home on Apple devices.
The interface combines high-level dashboards with detailed reports, allowing you to move naturally from a quick overview to in-depth analysis whenever you need more information.

sections.heading: Growing with Every Release
paragraphs: StudioDash continues to evolve with new integrations, reports, automation, and developer tools being added over time.
Features that are still in development are clearly identified, ensuring you always know which capabilities are available today and which are planned for future releases.
